overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City environment. The journey begins in a flooded urban plaza, continues through palm-lined walkways and past neon-lit buildings including the Casa D'Imperio, and ends at a city street intersection with a carousel structure visible through the downpour.

events.description: climbs out of flooded pool onto dry plaza pavement

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water in the flooded plaza with a flashlight illuminating debris

entered.detail: large flooded urban pool with murky water reflecting neon lights
colorful broken umbrella or debris floating in the water illuminated by flashlight
concrete wall surrounding the flooded plaza area
glowing neon signs and building lights visible through the rain in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a flooded urban pool during a heavy downpour at night. The water reflects the ambient neon glow from the distant city while rain streaks across the view. A colorful debris object floats nearby, illuminated by a flashlight, as the character approaches the pool's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees

events.description: encounters first NPC pedestrians walking through the rain
passes under brighter street lamps revealing more of the plaza details

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet plaza pavement toward the city center, passing palm trees and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking through the rain toward the plaza center
figure standing near a palm tree observing the surroundings

entered.detail: wet tiled pavement reflecting streetlights and neon signs
tall palm trees lining the plaza perimeter
large illuminated advertisements on distant skyscrapers
building with distinctive pink neon lotus flower signage

segments.scene_description: Having exited the flooded pool, the character walks across an open urban plaza lined with palm trees. Sparse pedestrians move through the rain, and the distant city skyline glows with neon billboards. A distinctive building with a pink lotus sign becomes visible on the right as the character progresses toward the city center.

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the Casa D'Imperio building
passes through stone gate structure into narrower passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage beneath the Casa D'Imperio sign, moving from open plaza to enclosed walkway

entered.detail: two-story building with illuminated orange Casa D'Imperio signage on the roof
elevated wooden decking forming the passage floor
stone archway and metal gate marking the passage entrance
concrete overhang providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a semi-covered walkway beneath the Casa D'Imperio building. The wooden decking and building overhang provide partial shelter from the heavy rain. Passing through a stone gate structure, the environment becomes more enclosed with commercial buildings on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with traffic barriers

events.description: exits covered walkway onto city street with vehicle traffic
approaches crosswalk with yellow and white striped markings
turns left to cross the street toward the illuminated carousel

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street and crossing at the intersection toward a lit carousel structure

notable_agents.action: dark colored vehicle parked along the curb near traffic barriers

entered.detail: wet black asphalt road surface with puddles reflecting streetlights
red and white striped barriers and bollards lining the street edge
illuminated circular carousel or merry-go-round structure with bright lights
zebra crossing with white and yellow stripes across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a city street with wet asphalt and traffic barriers. The character walks past parked vehicles and approaches an intersection marked with a crosswalk. In the distance, an illuminated carousel structure glows through the rain, surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The character turns to cross the street, completing the journey from the flooded plaza to the bustling city intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched urban landscape that transforms from a flooded plaza into a bustling city intersection. It begins by wading through a flooded urban pool under a heavy downpour, where a flashlight illuminates floating debris amidst neon reflections in the water. As the character exits the pool, the scene opens into a wide plaza lined with palm trees and glowing billboards, moving toward a distinctive building marked by a pink lotus sign. The camera then shifts into a more enclosed environment, passing through a stone gate and beneath the wooden decking of the Casa D'Imperio's covered walkway. Finally, the path leads out onto wet asphalt streets past parked vehicles and traffic barriers, ending at a crosswalk where an illuminated carousel glows beneath towering neon skyscrapers.
